declarations.name: PdfViewerAdvanced

slots.description: No slots — the component is self-contained.

members.name: src
members.description: URL of the PDF document to display. Supports absolute and relative paths.

members.name: page
members.description: Page number to navigate to (string, e.g. `"5"`). Synced via `location.hash`.

members.name: zoom
members.description:
Zoom level as percentage string (e.g. `"150"`) or named value
(`"page-fit"`, `"page-width"`, `"auto"`). Synced via `location.hash`.

members.name: search
members.description: Text to search for within the document. Synced via `location.hash`.

members.name: phrase
members.description: Whether `search` is an exact phrase (`"true"`) or individual words.

members.name: pagemode
members.description: Sidebar mode: `"none"`, `"thumbs"`, `"bookmarks"`, or `"attachments"`.

members.name: locale
members.description:
BCP 47 locale for the viewer UI (e.g. `"es"`, `"de"`).
Changing this triggers a full viewer re-initialization — there is no
incremental locale update in PDF.js.

members.name: viewerCssTheme
members.description: Color theme for the viewer: `"AUTOMATIC"`, `"LIGHT"`, or `"DARK"`.

members.name: iframeTitle
members.description: Accessibility title for the `<iframe>` element.

members.name: workerSrc
members.description: Override URL for the PDF.js web worker script.

members.name: cMapUrl
members.description: Override URL for CMap (character map) files.

members.name: iccUrl
members.description: Override URL for ICC color profile files.

members.name: imageResourcesPath
members.description: Override URL for viewer image resources.

members.name: sandboxBundleSrc
members.description: Override URL for the scripting sandbox bundle.

members.name: standardFontDataUrl
members.description: Override URL for standard PDF font data.

members.name: wasmUrl
members.description: Override URL for WebAssembly files used by PDF.js.

members.name: initComplete
injectViewerStyles

parameters.name: styleText
parameters.description: Raw CSS string to inject (not a URL).

members.description:
Injects custom CSS into the viewer iframe.

Styles survive viewer re-initialization (e.g. locale changes) — they are
stored internally and re-applied after each init cycle. Duplicate strings
are ignored.

members.name: setViewerOptions
members.description:
Sets PDF.js `AppOptions` on the viewer.

If the viewer is already initialized, options are applied immediately.
If called before initialization completes, options are queued and applied
during the init sequence.

**Note:** Some structural options (e.g. `workerSrc`) require a full
viewer reload to take effect. Use the dedicated attributes for those.

members.name: currentPage
members.description: Current visible page number (1-based). Updated via the PDF.js `pagechanging` event.

members.name: totalPages
members.description: Total number of pages in the loaded document. Set after the `pagesloaded` event.

members.name: currentZoom
members.description: Current zoom as a raw scale multiplier (e.g. `1.5` means 150%). Updated via `scalechanging`.

events.name: viewer-error
events.description: An error occurred during initialization or PDF loading. `event.detail` contains the error object.

events.name: page-change
events.description: The visible page changed. `event.detail.page` is the 1-based page number.

events.name: zoom-change
events.description: The zoom level changed. `event.detail.zoom` is the raw scale multiplier (e.g. `1.5` = 150%).

attributes.description: URL of the PDF document to display. Supports absolute and relative paths.

declarations.name: ViewerCssTheme
declarations.description:
Numeric values for the PDF.js `viewerCssTheme` option.

- `AUTOMATIC` (0) — follows the user's OS preference via `prefers-color-scheme`.
- `LIGHT` (1) — forces light mode regardless of OS setting.
- `DARK` (2) — forces dark mode regardless of OS setting.

declarations.name: styles
declarations.default: css` :host { font-family: sans-serif; display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; height: 100%; contain: content; box-sizing: border-box; } :host([hidden]), [hidden] { display: none !important; } *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: inherit; } .viewer-container { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .iframe-wrapper { flex: 1; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 0; } `
